descriptionShort: Winnipeg Jets rookie team exhibition games against University of Manitoba Bisons featuring various prospects including Matt Hervey, who played under Orland Kurtenbach.
descriptionLong: The Winnipeg Jets rookie team will compete in exhibition games against the University of Manitoba Bisons at the university arena on Sunday and Monday. The roster includes several notable prospects such as former Montreal Canadiens goaltender Steve Penney, ex-Sherbrooke Canadiens defenceman Bobby Dollas, and others. Matt Hervey of Los Angeles played Tier II hockey under ex-NHLer Orland Kurtenbach and is listed in the lineup.
